occurrence_sentence: Nu Quantum, the Cambridge-based quantum networking company, today announces that it has won a significant contract from the UK government to deliver a world-first modular, rack-mount and scalable quantum data centre prototype under the 'SBRI: Quantum Networks, Enabling Components & Systems' competition.
